plugins.name: QR Code Generator
plugins.description: Turn any URL into a scannable QR code. Every code you generate is saved locally so you can reopen it later.

plugins.name: File Tree
plugins.description: Scan a drive or folder and see exactly what's using your space — every directory and file rolled up and sorted largest-first, with size bars. Like WizTree, inside luma.

plugins.name: Bulletin Board
plugins.description: A freeform corkboard where you can pin notes, quick ideas, images, and checklists.

plugins.name: Price Tracker
plugins.description: Paste a product URL and luma checks the price for you. Every check is saved so you get a full price-history graph — great for watching deals on Amazon, bol.com, and more.

plugins.name: Calendar
plugins.description: Plan your days with a full month view and an upcoming-agenda list. Add color-coded events with times, all-day toggles, locations, notes, reminders and repeat rules — daily, weekly, monthly or yearly. Everything is searchable and stored locally.

plugins.name: Cloud Files
plugins.description: Upload files to your own sync server and get them back on every device. Everything is end-to-end encrypted on your device before upload — the server only ever stores unreadable data. Files count against your account's 3 GB storage quota, shown as a usage bar. Requires signing in under Settings → Sync & account.

plugins.name: Data Management
plugins.description: Create custom datasets, edit tables with typed columns, and build interactive charts — bar, line, area, and pie. Import and export CSV too.

plugins.name: Server Hosting Tycoon
plugins.description: Build a server-hosting empire right inside luma. Buy rigs and routers, spec them with real CPUs, motherboards, RAM and cooling, host services, accept contracts, and manage power and bandwidth as you grow day by day.

plugins.name: Mood Journal
plugins.description: Track your daily mood and write a short journal entry. See your emotional patterns on a monthly calendar heat-map and spot trends over time.

plugins.name: YouTube Downloader
plugins.description: Paste a YouTube link and download the video or just the audio, with full control over resolution, bitrate, and output format. Keeps a history of everything you've downloaded.
